topic: European Political Speech and Content Moderation Controversies (April 24 - May 1, 2026)
editorial_overview: No search results were available to identify relevant news articles from European sources published in the last week covering political figures deleting social media content, controversial statements online, government-ordered content removal, digital censorship, platform moderation controversies, or court orders affecting political speech. To complete this press review, fresh searches would be needed to access current reporting from established European news outlets on these topics.
